title: Bedwars Wools
body:
**Works Fine from 1.13 to 1.21.11, It can shows warning while applying don't worry it will work fine**
# Bedwars Wools By SILENT!
**Bedwars Wool Retextured every color of wool to make better Bedwars GAMEPLAY.**

Looks Like These!      ![White](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/065b169674b38f87ab3053050a60eeaabbcef1a1.png)

### ⚠️ Compatibility Note
1. Tested on Vanilla Minecraft Only not tested with mods
2. **Works Fine from 1.13 to 1.21.8, It can shows warning while applying don't worry it will work fine**
3. Fully tested by me if not works not my problem


---

BETTER UR GAMEPLAY WITH SILENT
